title: Object Detector
description: Detects objects in images using a HuggingFace object-detection model
(DETR, YOLOS, or custom). Filters images by detection confidence and an optional
class allowlist, then forwards matching images downstream.
Pair with the Visual Similarity Filter node for reference-image matching.

input.description: Images to filter by object detection.

output.description: Images that contain at least one detected object meeting the criteria.
Detection metadata (frame index, timestamp, label, confidence) for matched images.

objdet.detection_model.title: Detection model (HuggingFace)
objdet.detection_model.description: HuggingFace model name for object detection (e.g. facebook/detr-resnet-50)

objdet.class_allowlist.title: Object classes to keep
objdet.class_allowlist.description: Comma-separated class labels to forward (e.g. 'car,truck'). Leave empty to keep all detected classes.

objdet.min_confidence.title: Minimum detection confidence
objdet.min_confidence.description: Detection confidence threshold (0.0–1.0). Detections below this score are discarded.

objdet.fps.title: Input frame rate (fps)
objdet.fps.description: Frame rate of the upstream frame_grabber, used to compute timestamps in the output table.
